creator: amontalban@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 175007
bsd.sites.mk patch

Hi,

Google Code seems to be down, but it has some archive URLs that can be used to make broken ports build again (Just tested this with databases/credis port).

Attached is the patch to Mk/bsd.sites.mk to update URL pattern for Google Code.

#212710 is similar to this but for specific port.

Thanks!
